title: Glazed: A Honey Expansion
description: Adds 20 new food items, giving honey the sweet uses it deserves.
body:
![Title of the project: "Glazed: A Honey Expansion"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2c104417b320dee3fb1988928f5f419ad7dcdc8.png) --- ### RESOURCE PACK REQUIRED TO CORRECTLY VIEW ITEMS IN-GAME [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T81FJU3R) --- **Glazed: A Honey Expansion** is a Data Pack that revolves around honey and the food system of the game, adding **new food** and **slightly better versions of existing food** made using honey. The main goal of Glazed is to incentivize players to use honey more often, by rewarding them with stronger food options that are balanced around pre-existing rules of the Vanilla food system. While doing so, Glazed gives some new uses to other food items to also incentivize their use (e.g **Sweet Berries** and **Glow Berries**). --- ![All 20 new food items added by the Data Pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d630cb5e3cfe782e1ddfc1f91be066d99c21831.png) Here is the **full list** of new available food items, along with their hunger values. **For Crafting recipes, visit the Gallery.** | New Food | Effects | | ------------- |:-------------:| | ![Glazed Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53119492ebca9a4612c1f55bad14bcb2ca1a650a.png) Glazed Apple | 3 ![Hunger icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53ebe0adbfa1105ec156576e720aafc6a07c529a.png) | | ![Glazed Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70f952e334298aa78498c193124cc88152f02b9e.png) Glazed Golden Apple | 3.5 ![Hunger icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53ebe0adbfa1105ec156576e720aafc6a07c529a.png)

0:20 Glowing I ![Glowing effect icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eef387af3f3906714c987893dd440b22804817e5.png) | | ![Honey Cookie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff175992837f746063c895554c93e8a301794d3e.png) Honey Cookie | 1 ![Hunger icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53ebe0adbfa1105ec156576e720aafc6a07c529a.png) | | ![Honey Cake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a7487ca007f479553314baecbca2c212b733131.png) Honey Cake | 7 ![Hunger icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53ebe0adbfa1105ec156576e720aafc6a07c529a.png) | --- ### Installation To properly install Glazed, both the Data Pack and the Resource Pack must be installed. To manually install the Data Pack, simply drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'datapack' folder inside your world folder. To manually install the required Resource Pack, drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'resourcepacks' folder inside your main MC directory. Glazed extremely lightweight and is compatible with Multiplayer, as long as the Resource Pack is correctly loaded. Currently supported versions: 1.21.2+ --- ### Support If you like my Data Packs, Resource Packs or textures, consider **donating**, it would really mean a lot to me. If you are interested in **commissioning** any content, **contact me** on any available platform, I'll try to reach out to you as fast as I can. **Suggestions** for future Minecraft content are also well received. Thank you for taking a look at my content. :)
